articles.description: Raghav Chadha said he had raised the issue of what he described as the “loot being perpetrated on Prepaid Recharge Customers in Parliament today.”

topStories.title: Damage caused to buildings in Tehran following US-Israeli strikes
topStories.description: Video shows the destruction caused to buildings in Iran’s capital after a reported strike near Mehrabad airport.

topStories.description: With a reward of $1 million on any information on him, the Federal Bureau of Investigation has ramped up the search for Gujarat native Bhadreshkumar Chetanbhai Patel, wanted for his wife's murder in...

topStories.title: "Mom, Don't Know If I'll Return": Faridabad Pilot Before UAE Rescue Mission
topStories.description: In the middle of the war between the US, Israel and Iran, a young pilot from Faridabad, 23-year-old Deepika Adhana, played a key role in rescuing 169 Indians stranded in the UAE.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 12 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: Iran says more than 1,300 civilians have been killed and nearly 10,000 civilian sites have been hit by Israel and US.

topStories.title: Stock Market Crash: Nifty, Sensex In Deep Red As These Factors Weigh
topStories.description: The Nifty slipped below its immediate support of 24,000 points to a level last seen in April when the US unleashed its 'Liberation Day' tariff policies.

topStories.title: US-Iran war: What’s at risk if Strait of Hormuz closes amid West Asia conflict? UN warns...
topStories.description: The UN warns of significant global trade risks, including increased food prices and cost-of-living, if the Strait of Hormuz is closed due to escalating West Asia conflict.

topStories.title: Supreme Court allows withdrawal of life support to 31-year-old man in coma for over 12 years
topStories.description: J.B. Pardiwala and K.V. Viswanathan said the withdrawal of life support must not be a “single act” but a structured and clearly articulated withdrawal

topStories.title: Supreme Court approves passive euthanasia for 31-year-old man in coma for over 12 years
topStories.description: In a landmark decision, the Supreme Court has permitted passive euthanasia for Harish Rana, a 31-year-old man in a coma for over 12 years. The ruling emphasizes dignity in death and the importance of expert medical opinions in such sensitive cases.

topStories.description: North Korea has endorsed Iran's appointment of Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and condemned US-Israeli strikes as ‘unlawful,’ whilst Kim Jong Un oversaw a fresh cruise missile test from Pyongyang's largest warship. Here's what it means for the widening conflict.

dailyNews.title: IEA eyes record oil release from strategic reserves as US‑Iran war drives prices — here's what changes
dailyNews.description: The IEA proposes a historic release of crude oil from strategic reserves to curb rising global prices amid geopolitical tensions, as the US‑Iran war continues.

dailyNews.title: Iran-US war: Govt announces relief measures for stranded West Asia-bound shippers
dailyNews.description: The shipping ministry has issued a standard operating procedure for handling all vessels loaded with shipments bound for West Asian ports.

dailyNews.title: Allies in India have been good actors, have temporarily allowed New Delhi to accept Russian oil already at sea: White House
dailyNews.description: “As we work to appease this temporary gap of oil supply around the world because of the Iranians, we have temporarily permitted them (India) to accept that Russian oil,” said White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt

dailyNews.title: Who are Clayton Fuller and Shawn Harris, candidates in the Georgia runoff election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene?
dailyNews.description: Clayton Fuller and Shawn Harris will compete in a runoff for Georgia's 14th Congressional District on April 7. Harris, a retired Army general, received the most votes, followed closely by Fuller, backed by Trump. The winner will serve until 2026 and campaign for a full term starting in 2027.

dailyNews.title: Katy Perry loses trademark case against Australian designer Katie Perry
dailyNews.description: The US singer lost the case in 2023 and later won on appeal, but now judges have ruled against her.

dailyNews.title: Iranian Military Shows It Knows How to Adapt, U.S. Officials Say
dailyNews.description: Iran appears to be targeting what it views as American vulnerabilities, including air defenses meant to guard troops and assets in the region.

dailyNews.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s New Supreme Leader Was Wounded Early in the War, Iranian and Israeli Officials Say
dailyNews.description: Officials say Mojtaba Khamenei’s legs were hurt, but the circumstances as well as the extent of his injuries were unclear. He has remained out of view since being announced as leader three days ago.

dailyNews.title: Bondi Is Said to Move to Military Housing Because of Threats
dailyNews.description: The attorney general relocated from a Washington apartment to a base in the area within the past month, according to people familiar with the situation.

dailyNews.title: Senate Moves Toward Passing Sweeping Housing Bill, but Challenges Lie Ahead
dailyNews.description: The legislation’s progress is all the more surprising because it addresses an issue that is shaping up to be the main battleground of the midterm elections: affordability. The effort could still stall.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Restart Global Entry Program
dailyNews.description: The program for people traveling internationally, set to come back online at 5 a.m. Wednesday, had been paused amid the shutdown of the Homeland Security Department.

dailyNews.title: Voting Company Smartmatic Says It’s a Target of Vindictive Prosecution by Trump
dailyNews.description: The voting technology company’s new court filing signals how far-reaching the legal fights over elections will be in 2026.

topStories.description: Clayton Fuller will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in an April runoff. Mr. Fuller’s win over a flashier Republican showed the power of the president’s support.

topStories.title: Maggie Gyllenhaal reveals Trump election inspired her to direct films like feminist horror 'The Bride'
topStories.description: Maggie Gyllenhaal said Donald Trump's 2016 election inspired her to become a film director, revealing this while promoting her feminist horror film "The Bride!"

topStories.title: Special election replacing Marjorie Taylor Greene goes to runoff between Trump-endorsed candidate and Democrat
topStories.description: The candidate Trump endorsed in the race, Lookout Mountain Judicial Circuit District Attorney Clay Fuller, will face Army veteran Shawn Harris in an April runoff election.

topStories.description: U.S. House Speaker Mike Johnson is linking House Republicans closely to President Donald Trump as the midterm election season heats up.

topStories.description: President Trump says the Iran war will end "very soon," but Tehran says it's "prepared to continue attacking" indefinitely, and it won't let oil leave the Gulf.

dailyNews.description: Trump-backed Clayton Fuller and Shawn Harris advance to a runoff election to fill Marjorie Taylor Greene's seat.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: 140 US troops wounded so far, mostly minor injuries
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth says Trump to decide when Iran war is over, amid mixed messages on endgame
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Tuesday said the U.S. will end its war with Iran "on our timeline."

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump says Cuba could fall quickly. How realistic is that?
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump suggests Cuba could be “easy” to overthrow as tensions grow in the region. Mick Mulroy weighs what U.S. intervention would actually look like.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump 'would not be happy' if Russia was sharing intelligence with Iran
dailyNews.description: WH press sec. Karoline Leavitt told ABC News' Karen Travers neither Pres. Trump nor U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff "would be happy" if it turns out Russia has been sharing intelligence with Iran.

dailyNews.title: U.S. forces sink 16 Iranian minelayers as reports say Tehran is mining the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Trump warned of “military consequences … at a level never seen before” if mines were not removed.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will build first refinery in 50 years with investment from India's Reliance Industries
dailyNews.description: U.S. President said India's largest private energy company Reliance Industries is investing in a $300-billion refinery project in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Anduril expands into space as defense tech angles to support Trump's Golden Dome
dailyNews.description: Anduril, founded by Oculus creator Palmer Luckey, is positioning itself to be a key player in President Trump's "Golden Dome" project.
